reason_for_decision: The article has a usable directional structure, but it does not meet the strict pass threshold because it is below the 1000-word minimum and needs deeper operational treatment.
major_issues: The article is below the strict 1000-word pass floor.
Several sections are directionally useful but too compressed to support a full PASS decision under the current rubric.

revision_actions: Expand the article to exceed 1000 words while preserving a clear knowledge-base structure.

The core direction is serviceable enough that revision is more appropriate than full rewrite.
